ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Chilli Infused Tofu (88%) (Tofu (Water, Soya Beans, Nigari), Cayenne Chilli Pepper, Red Chilli Flakes, Sea Salt, Cane Sugar, Garlic Powder), Sriracha Hot Chilli Sauce (12%) (Chilli (61%), Sugar Syrup (Sugar, Water), Salt, Garlic, Water, Stabilizer (E415), Acidity Regulator (E260 E330), Preservative (E202)).
